label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Chime collects extensive financial data required for banking services. As a fintech platform, it operates under financial privacy regulations (Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act). Data sharing is limited compared to consumer tech companies but partners extensively with banking infrastructure. Does not sell customer financial data. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
